title: Prop Drilling
body:
## Definition

**Prop drilling** is passing props through many intermediate components that do not use them, only to reach a deep child.

## Why it exists

Not intentional — symptom of [one-way data flow](concept:one-way-data-flow) without better structure.

## How it works

Fixes: [composition](concept:react-composition) (children slots), Context, colocate state, or external store (Zustand).

## Common confusion

Drilling 1–2 levels is fine. Context for everything causes broad [re-renders](concept:react-re-render).

## In practice

Interview tradeoff question: Context vs composition vs Zustand vs TanStack Query for server data.

## Definition

**[Prop drilling](concept:prop-drilling)** is passing props through many intermediate components that do not use them, only to reach a deep child.

## Why it exists

Not intentional — symptom of [one-way data flow](concept:one-way-data-flow) without better structure.

## How it works

Fixes: [composition](concept:react-composition) (children slots), [Context](concept:use-context), colocate state, or external store ([Zustand](concept:zustand)).

## Common confusion

Drilling 1–2 levels is fine. [Context](concept:use-context) for everything causes broad [re-renders](concept:react-re-render).

## In practice

Interview tradeoff question: [Context](concept:use-context) vs [composition](concept:react-composition) vs [Zustand](concept:zustand) vs [TanStack Query](concept:tanstack-query) for server data.
